alias.description: The label of the monetary of this switch service.

counterparty_alias.description: The IBAN alias that's displayed for this switch service.

status.description: The status of the switch service.

user_alias.description: The label of the user creator of this switch service.

sub_status.description: The sub status of the switch service.

time_start_desired.description: The timestamp when the switch service desired to be start.

time_start_actual.description: The timestamp when the switch service actually starts.

time_end.description: The timestamp when the switch service ends.

attachment.description: Reference to the bank transfer form for this switch-service.
